name: Foster & Eldridge
message: Foster & Eldridge, LLP is a Boston area boutique law firm recognized for its excellence in medical malpractice defense. The firm specializes in representing health care providers in professional liability matters and offers consulting and litigation services in risk management and regulatory compliance.We are ready to upload 60gb of corporate data. Detailed client personal information (passports, DLs, phones, addresses, medical information and so on), financials, hearings, police records, etc.
